untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of a specific chart pattern (Adam & Eve Double Tops) with two peaks at equal price levels and neckline breakout. This pattern recognition requires multi-bar historical analysis and peak/valley detection that cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicators and basic operators. Stop placement and target price computation are marked AUTHOR_SILENT in the source material, making precise exit rules unavailable.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the SHORT bias with a simplified entry near support (s1, representing the neckline) and exit on mean reversion above sma_20. However, the core pattern detection (formation of two equal-height tops, neckline identification) is beyond the scope of indicator-based rules and requires custom pattern recognition logic. Success rate of 72% in bear markets is noted but cannot be directly encoded in rule conditions. Regime set to BEAR_MARKET as specified in target regimes.
